item.title: Review: A Case of Exploding Mangoes
item.description: Takeaways About Curses people abuse because it sounds cool and requires no imagination to vent. useless weapons for people who do not even have the courage of vocabulary to come up with proper invective for their enemies. The ability to learn to defend against noise and wield it as a weapon is an important skill. Metaphor: being as innocent as canaries. It all depends on how you are feeling and how you would rather feel.
